name: Christmas Candy Molds
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a saucepan with cooking spray.
2. Add sugar, corn syrup, and water to the saucepan.
3. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring constantly until sugar has dissolved.
4. Cook to hard-ball stage or 300°F (150°C) on a candy thermometer.
5. Remove from heat; add extract and food coloring.
6. Cool mixture to 200°F (93°C) on a candy thermometer.
7. Spray inside of Christmas molds well with cooking spray.
8. Using a wooden spoon, push cooled mixture into molds quickly.
9. Allow to cool until firm.
